items.name: neural-maze/production-ocr-course
items.full_text: Build, deploy, and scale a production-grade OCR pipeline using Rust, vLLM, Redis, KEDA, and Kubernetes.

items.name: ddcat-ai/open-ai-canvas
items.full_text: 面向 AI 影视创作的开源无限画布工作台，集成多模态生成、分镜编排、素材管理与 Agent 工作流。

items.name: zhuang2002/Self_Gradient_Forcing
items.full_text: Self Gradient Forcing (SGF) recovers the missing context-gradient path for self-generated causal memory through a bounded two-pass replay, enabling models trained with only a 5-second window to extrapolate to minute-scale videos with stronger identity, layout, and temporal stability.
